PATIENT_ID: TEST_AKI_DIALYSIS_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-01-20 14:00:00

[PHYSICIAN_NOTE] 2026-01-22 09:00:00
Patient developed acute kidney injury during hospitalization.
Creatinine rose to 5.1 mg/dL from baseline 1.3.
Initiated hemodialysis emergently for fluid overload and uremia.

[LAB] 2026-01-22 06:00:00
Creatinine: 5.1 mg/dL (baseline 1.3)
BUN: 78 mg/dL
Potassium: 6.2 mEq/L

[NURSING_NOTE] 2026-01-22 10:00:00
Patient received emergent hemodialysis via temporary catheter.
Continuous veno-venous hemofiltration initiated in ICU.
Urine output minimal, anuric for past 14 hours.
